content: Establish baseline: Profile model to identify hotspot subgraphs and measure initial cycle counts
activeForm: Establishing baseline: profiling model and measuring initial cycles

content: Extract initial tiling configuration from profiling results and transform dialect specs
activeForm: Extracting initial tiling configuration from profiling results

content: Consult riscv-tiling-performance-analyst: Get expert analysis on initial configuration and optimization recommendations
activeForm: Consulting riscv-tiling-performance-analyst for initial optimization strategy

content: Implement Round 1 optimizations: Apply agent-recommended tiling changes to transform dialect specs
activeForm: Implementing Round 1 tiling optimizations from agent recommendations

content: Measure Round 1 results: Compile with new transforms, run on FPGA, collect cycle counts
activeForm: Measuring Round 1 performance on FPGA board

content: Analyze Round 1 results with agent: Compare before/after, identify what worked and what didn't
Implement Round 2 optimizations: Refine tiling based on measured feedback from Round 1
Measure Round 2 results: Recompile and run on FPGA with refined configuration
activeForm: Measuring Round 2 performance on FPGA board

content: Analyze Round 2 results with agent: Determine if further optimization is needed or if we've converged
activeForm: Analyzing Round 2 results and determining next steps

content: Optional Round 3+: Continue iterative refinement if significant improvements are still possible
activeForm: Performing additional optimization rounds if needed

content: Finalize and export: Export optimized model with best-performing transform configuration
Document findings: Create summary of tiling strategies, cycle improvements, and lessons learned
